title: 2009 Press Releases
summary: This is an index page listing all Federal Reserve press releases from 2009, covering FOMC statements, Term Auction Facility operations, enforcement actions, and regulatory proposals. The page aggregates dozens of individual press releases from the 2009 calendar year. As a listing page, this is not a single archiveable document but rather a navigation index to separate press releases.
key_points: Listing page from Federal Reserve website containing all press releases dated 2009
Contains references to two FOMC statements (November 4, 2009 and December 16, 2009)
References multiple Term Auction Facility operations offering $25-75 billion in 28-day and 42-day credit
Includes FOMC minutes from November 3-4, 2009 meeting (released November 24, 2009)
Includes regulatory proposals: Regulation D amendment for term deposit facility, TALF rules, overdraft fee restrictions
Contains numerous enforcement actions (written agreements, cease and desist orders)
why_it_matters: This listing page aggregates 2009 Federal Reserve communications but is not itself an archiveable research document. Individual press releases within this listing would be more suitable for archival, particularly the FOMC statements, minutes, and Term Auction Facility announcements which have historical relevance to understanding the Fed's crisis response. Per Rule 5, listing pages are non-archiveable.
macro_context: 2009 represents the peak crisis response period following the 2008 financial collapse. The Term Auction Facility operations and FOMC statements from this period reflect the Fed's use of unconventional monetary policy tools. This listing page does not provide the detailed content needed to assess macro implications.
market_structure_context: References to Term Auction Facility operations ($25-75 billion auctions) and regulatory proposals (Regulation D amendments, TALF rules) indicate Fed work on emergency lending facilities and regulatory structure during the financial crisis. This listing page does not contain the detailed operational content required for market structure analysis.

issues_found: Source is correctly identified as a listing_page per source_type and URL pattern (2009all.htm is an archive index)
Rule 5 explicitly requires rejection of listing_page types - this source is non-archiveable as a single document
Source predates TODAY by over 16 years (2009-12-31) - flagged as historical, but still subject to listing_page rejection rule
Content is truncated in source body, preventing complete verification of all listed items
event_type correctly set to 'unknown' as a listing page has no single event type

notes: NON-ARCHIVABLE: This is a listing page aggregating Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2009. Per Rule 6, listing pages should be treated as non-archiveable. The individual press releases referenced (FOMC statements, TAF operations, enforcement actions, regulatory proposals) would each require separate archival if their full content is needed. Source predates TODAY by over 16 years and is historical in nature. Content is truncated, preventing complete verification.
